name: Architecture Optimizer
description: Iteratively evaluate and improve architecture documents and system design specs through autonomous score-refine loops.
longDescription:
Runs autonomous test-score-refine loops on architecture docs, system design specs, and ADR collections. Builds a component map (services, interfaces, data flows, deployment topology) then scores against a frozen harness with **anchored rubrics** across **6 dimensions**:

- **Component Responsibility Clarity**: ownership boundaries, single-responsibility
- **Interface Contract Completeness**: protocols, data formats, error handling
- **Failure Mode Analysis**: cascading failures, retry/fallback strategies
- **Data Flow Consistency**: end-to-end traceability, format transformations
- **Scalability / Capacity Planning**: load targets, bottleneck identification
- **Security Boundary Definition**: trust zones, auth boundaries, data classification

Each round: pick weakest check, apply one fix, re-score, keep or revert. Includes live `dashboard.html` and `component-map.json`. Supports full, audit-only, focused, and re-score modes.
